case_title: ERICA GREENWALD RESPONDENT VS. PARKLYN BAY COMPANY APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2004 - CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 501 BY ASSIGNMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2004 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2003 BY JAMES J. MCBRIDE BOTH SIDES APPEARED AND WERE AFFIRMED AND EXAMINED. WITNESSES AFFIRMED AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EXHIBITS RECEIVED IN EVIDENCE AND RETURNED AT CONCLUSION OF HEARING. HONORABLE JAMES J. MCBRIDE. NOT REPORTED. (GPS)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2004 - JUDGMENT ENTERED ON JAN-15-2004 IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT AND AGAINST DEFENDANT/APPELLANT FOR $500 PLUS $52 COSTS AND INTEREST ACCRUING AT THE LEGAL RATE FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. HONORABLE JAMES J. MCBRIDE. (GPS)
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT PARKLYN BAY COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT GREENWALD, ERICA HEARING SET FOR JAN-14-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINUTES FOR JAN-14-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT GREENWALD, ERICA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PARKLYN BAY COMPANY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $552.00, INTEREST ACCRUES AT THE LEGAL RATE FROM THE DATE OF JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOC
